Optional local SDK location for building Straw_SamExtensions.dll.

Either set the F4SE_SDK environment variable, or copy/extract the F4SE SDK here so this file exists:

  Native\Straw_SamExtensions\external\f4se_sdk\f4se\PluginAPI.h

The SDK root must also contain f4se_common\Relocation.h and the Papyrus headers.
